mnemonics: CAP Columns: Consistency sacrificed for Availability and Partition tolerance in Column stores
keyPoints: Stores data by column instead of row for efficient analytics
Uses column families to group related data columns
Optimized for reading and writing large volumes of data quickly
commonMistakes: Assuming it uses SQL queries (most use proprietary APIs)
Confusing with relational databases due to 'column' terminology
Using for transactional systems instead of analytical workloads
